understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to complete the current BP35 level, doing so within the 50-turn limit and 2 attempts per level, then continue completing levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: move (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) or CLICK a target tile. Movement shifts the player one tile in the chosen direction, but after moving the player may also slide/fall in the current gravity direction until landing on support or otherwise resolving (as seen when a move caused a drop from [5,10] to [5,7]). Gravity remains in effect between turns and is indicated (e.g., DOWN). CLICK removes specified clickable tile(s), which can open paths or trigger a fall/teleport-like drop if the removed tile was supporting the player or altered the traversable structure (e.g., clicking [3,15] caused the player to drop from [3,16] to [3,10]). Landing on a spike tile immediately ends the attempt/run. An undo/reset is effectively handled by the game by restarting the level after a failed attempt; you have two attempts per level.
